_README: Single source of truth for the v6 SSE wire-format contract test. Both shared/chat/__fixtures__/v6-wire-contract.ts and shared/chat/__fixtures__/v6_wire_contract.py load this JSON and reconstruct the canonical UTF-8 byte stream by joining `frames` with the v6 separator '\n\n'. The `expected_events` array is the contract — every parser (agent, frontend, backend harness) must surface these events in this order from the canonical bytes.
